name: Hurry-up Vegetable Chili
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces canned chili beans with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heavy saucepan, sauté the onions and garlic in olive oil until soft. Do not brown.
2. Add the orzo and cook, stirring, 1 to 2 minutes, until well coated.
3. Stir in the tomatoes and their liquid with 1 can of broth. Bring mixture to a boil.
4. Add celery, carrots, chili powder, cumin, cayenne pepper, oregano, marjoram, yellow squash, pattypan squash, zucchini, and tomato sauce.
5. Return to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer 20 minutes, adding additional chicken broth as needed until the mixture is thick rather than watery.
6. Add beans and season with salt and pepper to taste. Continue cooking until beans are heated through.
